sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63539" key="lipo/culos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπό-ξῠλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63539.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lacking wood</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">defective, feeble</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πίστις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:71:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:21:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
